system.flavor: Your breath doesn't leave your body until the bullet leaves the barrel or the arrow escapes the string.
system.effect:
Effect your turn. You next attack with a listed range or line gains attack [+], +3 max range, and +3 max line.
Precision attack also gains: on hit: +2 damage and push 1, increased to +2d3 and push 2 at range 7+.
